steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to emphasize “whose point of view the novel is told from.” This is the decisive criterion that determines which choice answers the prompt.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly accomplishes this by explicitly stating the novel is “from the character Kaikeyi's point of view.” The other choices either ignore the POV question entirely (C only describes how Kaikeyi is portrayed, D only describes the original epic), or confuse it (B frames it as The Ramayana's perspective rather than the novel's).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
